title: Physical AI startup RLWRLD raises $26M
description:
RLWRLD said it is executing proof-of-concept and robotics transformation projects with enterprise partners in Japan and South Korea.

The post Physical AI startup RLWRLD raises $26M appeared first on The Robot Report.
